response.global_analysis:
1. Transcription & Translation: Manually transcribed and translated IRyS's fast-paced, multilingual (Japanese & English) presentation of her 2026 birthday merchandise.
2. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with the rapid pace of the speech, split logically to capture both Japanese and English utterances clearly.
3. No Vocal Music: Confirmed that only spoken narration and background instrumental music are present in the video.

subtitles.original: Diorama StandRyS!
subtitles.english: Diorama StandRyS!

subtitles.original: Illustration is by... Very beautiful, huh?
subtitles.english: Illustration is by... Very beautiful, huh?

subtitles.original: 犬乃づぴすけ先生。あ、ちなみにピスケ先生ですね。こちらの衣装もピスケ先生なんですよ。うふふ。
subtitles.english: Inu no Zupisuke-sensei! Ah, by the way, it's Pisuke-sensei. This outfit is also by Pisuke-sensei! Hehe.

subtitles.original: The diorama stand features IRyS in her Race Queen outfit perfectly...
subtitles.english: The diorama stand features IRyS in her Race Queen outfit perfectly...

subtitles.original: ...capturing the atmosphere of this 3D live stage, yes!
subtitles.english: ...capturing the atmosphere of this 3D live stage, yes!

subtitles.original: みんなも買おうねー！イェーイ！はい！
subtitles.english: Everyone, buy it, okay? Yay! Yes!

subtitles.original: And then the second one is this one! Yes!
subtitles.english: And then the second one is this one! Yes!

subtitles.original: The ChibiRyS Tote Bag! It's so cute!
subtitles.english: The ChibiRyS Tote Bag! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: Illustration, as in, on the tote bag is by LIEN-sensei!
subtitles.english: Illustration, as in, on the tote bag is by LIEN-sensei!

subtitles.original: いつもLIEN先生ありがとう！Thank you so much LIEN all the time! It's so cute, I love ChibiRyS.
subtitles.english: Thank you as always, LIEN-sensei! Thank you so much, LIEN, all the time! It's so cute, I love ChibiRyS.

subtitles.original: This tote features the mini IRyS in her, um, casual outfit, yes, drawn by LIEN-sensei, so cute!
subtitles.english: This tote features the mini IRyS in her, um, casual outfit, yes, drawn by LIEN-sensei, so cute!

subtitles.original: LIEN先生に描いてもらった、えっと、カジュアルアイリスのね、えっと、ちびになってます。可愛いトート。
subtitles.english: It's a cute tote featuring a chibi version of casual IRyS drawn by LIEN-sensei.

subtitles.original: ぜひ普段使いしてください。お出かけで使ってね。はい。
subtitles.english: Please use it for everyday use. Use it when you go out! Yes!

subtitles.original: Please use it when you go shopping and what not. And with the simple design, it's...
subtitles.english: Please use it when you go shopping and what not. And with the simple design, it's...

subtitles.original: ...perfect for everyday use. You can pair it with other merch that'll be introducing right after this, so show off your IRyS pride! Yay!
subtitles.english: ...perfect for everyday use. You can pair it with other merch that'll be introducing right after this, so show off your IRyS pride! Yay!

subtitles.original: あの、この後に紹介するグッズともね、合わせて使えるんで、楽しみにしててね。はい。
subtitles.english: You can pair it with the merch I'll introduce after this, so look forward to it! Yes!

subtitles.original: And then the third one...
subtitles.english: And then the third one...

subtitles.original: ...is the Race QueenRyS Keychain!
subtitles.english: ...is the Race QueenRyS Keychain!

subtitles.original: こちらの素晴らしい衣装のキーチェーンになってます。可愛いやろ？
subtitles.english: This wonderful outfit has been made into a keychain! Isn't it cute?

subtitles.original: あ、欲しいの？ Oh, you guys want it already? They want it already! まだ駄目！
subtitles.english: Oh, you want it? Oh, you guys want it already? They want it already! Not yet!

subtitles.original: ここからだよ。注文するよね？ You guys are going to buy it, right?
subtitles.english: It's from here on out. You're going to order it, right? You guys are going to buy it, right?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! 1セットで終わらないよね？
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! You won't stop at just one set, right?

subtitles.original: うーん、うーん、もう、爆買いしてくれるそうです！はい！
subtitles.english: Hmm, hmm, indeed, they said they'll bulk buy them! Yes!

subtitles.original: This is the new plushie featuring my new outfit!
subtitles.english: This is the new plushie featuring my new outfit!

subtitles.original: 新衣装のアイリスがぬいぐるみのキーホルダーになっちゃったよ。
subtitles.english: The new-outfit IRyS has become a plushie keychain!

subtitles.original: It's definitely cute on its own, but you can also carry it with its face peeking from the outer pocket of the tote bag!
subtitles.english: It's definitely cute on its own, but you can also carry it with its face peeking from the outer pocket of the tote bag!

subtitles.original: ぜひトートバッグの中に、ぽんって入れちゃって、一緒にお出かけしてね。
subtitles.english: Please put it right inside the tote bag and go out together!

subtitles.original: はい！And then the last one is the YabaiRyS Pouch!
subtitles.english: Yes! And then the last one is the YabaiRyS Pouch!

subtitles.original: みんなの大好きなヤバイリスだよ！何を考えてるんでしょう？
subtitles.english: It's everyone's favorite YabaiRyS! I wonder what she's thinking?

subtitles.original: I wonder what she's thinking with that face of hers, yes!
subtitles.english: I wonder what she's thinking with that face of hers, yes!

subtitles.original: YabaiRyS is back again! This face pouch with its high-impact design... yes, it's high impact...
subtitles.english: YabaiRyS is back again! This face pouch with its high-impact design... yes, it's high impact...

subtitles.original: ...can also be attached to a bag handle!
subtitles.english: ...can also be attached to a bag handle!

subtitles.original: そう、先ほどね、あの、紹介したトートバッグのね、取っ手にぽんって付けると、とっても可愛いよ！
subtitles.english: Yes, if you put it on the handle of the tote bag I introduced earlier, it's super cute!

subtitles.original: Yes, you can use it with the tote bag. Just put it on the, on the tote bag, and it'll be a perfect set!
subtitles.english: Yes, you can use it with the tote bag. Just put it on the, on the tote bag, and it'll be a perfect set!

subtitles.original: トートとぬい、and the pouch as a three-piece set, you can show off your IRyS love all around the world, yes!
subtitles.english: Tote, plushie, and the pouch as a three-piece set, you can show off your IRyS love all around the world, yes!

subtitles.original: あ、ちなみに、this is a pouch, by the way, just clarifying. これはポーチになってます。
subtitles.english: Ah, by the way, this is a pouch, by the way, just clarifying. This is a pouch.

subtitles.original: So you can zip it open and put things in it, tiny things in it. Yay!
subtitles.english: So you can zip it open and put things in it, tiny things in it. Yay!

subtitles.original: Okay, and then here are the full set bonuses! Yes! The postcard!
subtitles.english: Okay, and then here are the full set bonuses! Yes! The postcard!

subtitles.original: Illustration is the same illustration from Pisuke-sensei from the acrylic stand.
subtitles.english: Illustration is the same illustration from Pisuke-sensei from the acrylic stand.

subtitles.original: 犬乃づぴすけ先生の、素晴らしいイラスト。こちらのポストカードでも使ってます。
subtitles.english: We are using Inu no Zupisuke-sensei's wonderful illustration for this postcard as well.

subtitles.original: The limited edition features a handwritten message, yes...
subtitles.english: The limited edition features a handwritten message, yes...

subtitles.original: えーっと、数量限定版は直筆メッセージ、and, uh, foil-stamped duplicate autograph... あ、message... foil-stamped duplicate autograph and message...
subtitles.english: Um, the limited edition features a handwritten message, and, uh, foil-stamped duplicate autograph... ah, message... foil-stamped duplicate autograph and message...

subtitles.original: ポストカードです！なので、メッセージは直筆、直筆はメッセージの方です。はい。
subtitles.english: It's a postcard! So, the message is handwritten... the handwritten part is the message. Yes.

subtitles.original: So, you guys are going to buy the limited edition, right? Yeah, yeah. I want you guys to be as hyped as them, yeah!
subtitles.english: So, you guys are going to buy the limited edition, right? Yeah, yeah. I want you guys to be as hyped as them, yeah!

subtitles.original: The standard version comes with a foil-stamped duplicate autograph and message as well!
subtitles.english: The standard version comes with a foil-stamped duplicate autograph and message as well!

subtitles.original: あの、通常版ももちろんあるんで、箔押し複製サイン＆メッセージ入りポストカードになってます！
subtitles.english: The standard version is also available, so it comes with a foil-stamped duplicate autograph and message!

subtitles.original: So you can get both! ね、あの、限定版も通常版もぜひゲットしてねー！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: So you can get both! Please get both the limited edition and the standard version! Yay!

subtitles.original: みんな可愛いな。You guys are so cute. Aw, aw, they're so cute.
subtitles.english: Everyone is so cute. You guys are so cute. Aw, aw, they're so cute.

subtitles.original: Look at how big their heads are. 頭でかいね。
subtitles.english: Look at how big their heads are. Their heads are huge, aren't they?

subtitles.original: あ、挟まれる。あ、痛いよ、痛い、痛いよー。
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm getting squeezed! Ah, it hurts, it hurts, it hurts!

subtitles.original: はぁ、はぁ。もう、君たちはしょうがないな。
subtitles.english: *panting* Gosh, you guys are hopeless.

subtitles.original: There are plenty more announcements coming up! Yeah, if you guys can tell I'm already introducing merch, so...
subtitles.english: There are plenty more announcements coming up! Yeah, if you guys can tell I'm already introducing merch, so...

subtitles.original: ...there's a lot of other things coming up. このあともね、いろんな大きな告知があるんで...
subtitles.english: ...there's a lot of other things coming up. There are various big announcements after this too, so...

subtitles.original: ...ぜひ最後まで見ててくださいね。楽しみにしててね。
subtitles.english: ...please watch until the end, okay? Look forward to it!

subtitles.original: There are still big announcements after this, so stay tuned!
subtitles.english: There are still big announcements after this, so stay tuned!

subtitles.original: Alright! じゃあ、続きやるぞー！
subtitles.english: Alright! Now, let's keep going!

subtitles.original: Let's go on with the live! Woo!
subtitles.english: Let's go on with the live! Woo!
